title: Save sorting of a board in monday app

posts.author: Larissa_VANTOPIA (Larissa Peters)
posts.cookedHtml:
First, sorry for my english, I’m a german user.
I’ve saved a sorting for one column in one of my boards on the desktop (and it works, so it’s always sorted as I want from the beginning).
But when opening the board on the (iPad) App, which is the main usage device, it’s not sorted by that column. Do you have an idea, what I could do to also save the sorting within the app?
Many thanks in advance!
Larissa

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Larissa_VANTOPIA - Try saving your sorting preferences as a custom View, and then you should be able to make that view the default. I believe this will work on your iPad (but I don’t have one to test it myself).

posts.author: Larissa_VANTOPIA (Larissa Peters)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, thanks for the tip, but unfortunately I already tried this and it’s not working. The default view is the one that opens (by default) also on the iPad, but it’s not sorted by the column I want it to be sorted.

posts.author: rwilliams (Robert Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s mind blowing, but to my knowledge, there is no way to sort name columns on Monday IPAD. Not sure why sorting only matters to Monday on computer and not mobile.

Saving in browser view will not update Ipad or Mobile either.

posts.author: Joshing (Joshua)
posts.cookedHtml: @rwilliams Correct! I have been working like crazy to get everything sorted for my clients and my team. Then it was brought to my attention that an iPad would help our members in the field operate more efficiently. At first glance this was true, but with the sorting not saving (as our items are numbered to follow a section like pattern within groups) this has now turned into a hassle. Hopefully someone from the Moday.com team will address this with their developers.
